name: MeshNgon
summary: Represents a mesh ngon. When retrieved from the Ngon property of a mesh, this contains faces that have edge valence strictly higher than 4.When retrieving Ngons from GetNgonAndFacesEnumerable(), this might contain also triangles and quads.

methods.name: BoundaryVertexIndexList
methods.summary: Get the outer boundary mesh vertex list of the ngon. Vertices are sorted counterclockwise with respect to the direction of the face, although the degree by which vertex normals will respect this might vary.

returns.doc: A list of mesh vertex indexes.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares this MeshNgon with otherNgon and returns a value of 1, 0, or -1. Priority is for vertex count, then face count, then vertex index list values, then face index list values.

params.name: otherNgon
params.doc: The other MeshNgon to use in comparison.

returns.doc: 0: if this is identical to otherNgon-1: if this < otherNgon. +1: if this > otherNgon.

methods.name: Create
methods.signature: public static MeshNgon Create(IList<int> meshVertexIndexList, IList<int> meshFaceIndexList)
methods.summary: Constructs an ngon from lists of mesh vertex and face indexes.

params.name: meshVertexIndexList
params.doc: A list of mesh vertex indexes that define the outer boundary of the ngon. The mesh vertex indexes must be in the correct order.

params.name: meshFaceIndexList
params.doc: A list of mesh face indexes that define the interior of the ngon. The mesh face indexes may be in any order.

methods.name: Equals(MeshNgon)
methods.summary: Determines if this ngon and otherNgon are identical.

returns.doc: true if otherNgon is identical to this ngon; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines if otherObj is a MeshNgon and is identical to this ngon.

params.name: otherObj
params.doc: Any object the represents the other mesh face for comparison.

returns.doc: true if otherObj is a MeshNgon and is identical to this ngon; otherwise false.

methods.name: FaceIndexList
methods.summary: Get the ngon's mesh face index list.

returns.doc: A list of mesh face indexes.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns a runtime-stable hash code for the current mesh ngon. You are not allowed to rely on persistence of this hash code in serialization, but for each instance of the application, this hash code will be the same for ngons with identical vertex and face lists.

returns.doc: A non-unique integer that represents this mesh ngon.

methods.name: Set
methods.signature: public void Set(IList<int> meshVertexIndexList, IList<int> meshFaceIndexList)
methods.summary: Set the ngon vertex and face index lists.

params.name: meshVertexIndexList
params.doc: A list of mesh vertex indexes that define the outer boundary of the ngon. The mesh vertex indexes must be in the correct order.

params.name: meshFaceIndexList
params.doc: A list of mesh face indexes that define the interior of the ngon. The mesh face indexes may be in any order.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns a string representation for this MeshNgon. This is to provide a meaningful visualization of this structure and is subject to change in newer releases.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(MeshNgon a, MeshNgon b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two MeshNgon structures have equal values.

returns.doc: true if the vertex and face index lists are identical; otherwise false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(MeshNgon a, MeshNgon b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two MeshNgon structures have different values.

returns.doc: true if the vertex or face index lists are different in any way; otherwise false.

properties.name: BoundaryVertexCount
properties.summary: Get the number of vertices in this ngon. about length information.

properties.name: FaceCount
properties.summary: Get the number of faces in this ngon.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Get a mesh vertex index from the ngon's vertex index list.
